# signmos

> Lightweight e-signature workflow on TanStack Start, Hono, Cloudflare Workers, Neon Postgres, Drizzle, and R2.

## Primary Context

- [README.md](README.md): Current app overview, setup, manual smoke flow, lifecycle API, routes, scripts, verification.
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Agent-specific architecture, commands, workflow rules, verification requirements.
- [ARCHITECTURE.md](ARCHITECTURE.md): Stable physical codemap, module boundaries, invariants, and cross-cutting concerns.
- [docs/AGENT_GUIDE.md](docs/AGENT_GUIDE.md): Detailed agent operating rules distilled from `.claude/rules`.
- [plans/simple-esignature-prd.md](plans/simple-esignature-prd.md): Product requirements, lifecycle API contract, validation checklist, manual human UI smoke checklist.
- [plans/simple-esignature.md](plans/simple-esignature.md): Original phase plan for the e-signature workflow.
- [plans/frictionless-signing-ux-prd.md](plans/frictionless-signing-ux-prd.md): Sender-first signing, verification security, notifications, and completed-detail requirements.
- [plans/single-signer-mode-prd.md](plans/single-signer-mode-prd.md): Self-sign mode, signature reuse, and earlier confirmed-email history requirements.
- [plans/my-documents-prd.md](plans/my-documents-prd.md): Passwordless history, recovery, catalog, authorization, and security requirements.
- [plans/my-documents.md](plans/my-documents.md): Six-slice My Documents implementation plan.
- [plans/evidence/my-documents-release/](plans/evidence/my-documents-release/): Browser, keyboard, and scope evidence for the compatibility release.
- [plans/pilot-readiness-contract.md](plans/pilot-readiness-contract.md): Current agent-ready endpoint contract, smoke checklist, UI-state evidence, and PRD validation map.

## Implemented Workflow

- Draft envelope creation.
- Unselected landing chooser for self-sign, two-party signing, or My Documents.
- No-account sender start with email verification and restricted fallback links.
- Source PDF upload to R2 through `DOCUMENTS_BUCKET`.
- Recipient creation with a 10-recipient limit.
- Drawn and typed signature profile creation.
- Signature/date field placement via API and `/envelope-fields`.
- Parallel send with returned partner verification/signing links.
- Magic-link signer access through `/signing/{token}` after partner verification.
- Typed signature/date completion.
- Change requests, revised upload, resend, and completion after revision.
- Decline with reason and optional comment.
- Manual expire/delete controls and retention eligibility.
- Audit event persistence.
- Completed PDF finalization and final PDF download.
- Completed-document detail through existing process links.
- Privacy-safe My Documents request, single-use 30-minute link, and fixed eight-hour HTTP-only session.
- Retained creator/signer catalog with search, filters, action-first ordering, and numbered pagination.
- Session-authorized creator recovery/controls, recovered signing, completed detail/PDF access, and sign-out.
- Session-native self-sign or two-party draft creation without another email verification.
- Browser-driven local full workflow at `/manual-signing-smoke`.

## Key Files

### API

- [src/hono/api.ts](src/hono/api.ts): Mounts API endpoints.
- [src/hono/api/envelopes.ts](src/hono/api/envelopes.ts): Envelope lifecycle HTTP routes.
- [src/hono/api/envelope-preparation.ts](src/hono/api/envelope-preparation.ts): Signature profile and default field endpoints.
- [src/hono/api/signing.ts](src/hono/api/signing.ts): Signer magic-link HTTP routes.
- [src/hono/api/final-documents.ts](src/hono/api/final-documents.ts): Completed-document process-link routes.
- [src/hono/api/history-access.ts](src/hono/api/history-access.ts): History requests, credentials/sessions, catalog, detail, and PDF routes.
- [src/hono/api/history-envelope-start.ts](src/hono/api/history-envelope-start.ts): Session-native envelope start.
- [src/hono/api/history-creator.ts](src/hono/api/history-creator.ts): Creator recovery and control routes.
- [src/hono/api/history-signing.ts](src/hono/api/history-signing.ts): Recovered signer routes.
- [plans/pilot-readiness-contract.md](plans/pilot-readiness-contract.md): Agent-ready lifecycle contract and smoke evidence map.
- [src/hono/factory.ts](src/hono/factory.ts): Typed Hono factory.
- [src/server.ts](src/server.ts): Cloudflare Worker entry; routes `/api/*` to Hono.

### Envelope Domain

- [src/db/envelope/table.ts](src/db/envelope/table.ts): Drizzle tables for envelopes, documents, recipients, tokens, fields, values, audit events.
- [src/db/envelope/schema.ts](src/db/envelope/schema.ts): Zod schemas and response types.
- [src/db/envelope/queries.ts](src/db/envelope/queries.ts): Envelope lifecycle operations.
- [src/db/envelope/finalization.ts](src/db/envelope/finalization.ts): Completed PDF generation/storage/status helpers.
- [src/db/history-access/](src/db/history-access/): Passwordless credential/session lifecycle, catalog, authorization gateways, session-native start, and security audit.
- [src/db/schema.ts](src/db/schema.ts): Table re-exports for migrations.

### UI

- [src/routes/envelope-fields.tsx](src/routes/envelope-fields.tsx): Field editor route with query-param context.
- [src/routes/source-pdf-upload.tsx](src/routes/source-pdf-upload.tsx): Sender source PDF upload route.
- [src/components/sender/start-envelope-page.tsx](src/components/sender/start-envelope-page.tsx): No-account sender start UI.
- [src/routes/history-access.$credential.tsx](src/routes/history-access.$credential.tsx): History link confirmation route.
- [src/routes/my-documents.index.tsx](src/routes/my-documents.index.tsx): My Documents catalog route.
- [src/routes/my-documents.$envelopeId.manage.tsx](src/routes/my-documents.$envelopeId.manage.tsx): Creator recovery route.
- [src/routes/my-documents.$envelopeId.sign.tsx](src/routes/my-documents.$envelopeId.sign.tsx): Recovered signer route.
- [src/components/history/](src/components/history/): My Documents request, confirmation, catalog, new-document start, detail, and creator controls.
- [src/components/sender/source-pdf-upload-panel.tsx](src/components/sender/source-pdf-upload-panel.tsx): PDF upload/revision UI.
- [src/components/sender/signature-profile-panel.tsx](src/components/sender/signature-profile-panel.tsx): Drawn/typed signature profile UI.
- [src/components/envelopes/envelope-preparation-page.tsx](src/components/envelopes/envelope-preparation-page.tsx): Review envelope setup and preparation shell.
- [src/components/envelopes/field-editor.tsx](src/components/envelopes/field-editor.tsx): Field placement form.
- [src/routes/signing.$token.tsx](src/routes/signing.$token.tsx): Magic-link signer route.
- [src/components/signing/signer-page.tsx](src/components/signing/signer-page.tsx): Signer completion/decline UI.
- [src/routes/manual-signing-smoke.tsx](src/routes/manual-signing-smoke.tsx): Manual smoke route.
- [src/components/signing/manual-smoke-page.tsx](src/components/signing/manual-smoke-page.tsx): Full browser smoke workflow.

### Tests

- [src/hono/api/envelopes.test.ts](src/hono/api/envelopes.test.ts): Envelope creation and source PDF upload.
- [src/hono/api/envelope-recipients.test.ts](src/hono/api/envelope-recipients.test.ts): Recipients, send, resend, expiration.
- [src/hono/api/envelope-fields.test.ts](src/hono/api/envelope-fields.test.ts): Field model API.
- [src/hono/api/signing-flow.test.ts](src/hono/api/signing-flow.test.ts): Magic-link signing and decline.
- [src/hono/api/pdf-finalization.test.ts](src/hono/api/pdf-finalization.test.ts): Completed PDF and status/download.
- [src/hono/api/lifecycle-smoke.test.ts](src/hono/api/lifecycle-smoke.test.ts): Agent-style end-to-end API smoke.
- [src/hono/api/lifecycle-contract.test.ts](src/hono/api/lifecycle-contract.test.ts): PRD contract/checklist presence.
- [src/components/envelopes/field-editor.test.tsx](src/components/envelopes/field-editor.test.tsx): Field editor interaction.
- [src/components/signing/signer-page.test.tsx](src/components/signing/signer-page.test.tsx): Signer UI interaction.
- [src/components/signing/manual-smoke-page.test.tsx](src/components/signing/manual-smoke-page.test.tsx): Manual smoke UI interaction.
- [src/hono/api/history-envelope-start.test.ts](src/hono/api/history-envelope-start.test.ts): Session-native start authorization and idempotency.
- [src/hono/api/history-catalog-api.test.ts](src/hono/api/history-catalog-api.test.ts): Catalog authorization, query, and pagination.
- [src/hono/api/history-creator-recovery.test.ts](src/hono/api/history-creator-recovery.test.ts): Creator recovery and controls.
- [src/hono/api/history-signing-recovery.test.ts](src/hono/api/history-signing-recovery.test.ts): Recovered signing behavior.
- [src/release/my-documents-release-contract.test.ts](src/release/my-documents-release-contract.test.ts): Credential, scope, routing, and evidence release guard.

## Commands

```bash
pnpm install
pnpm cf-typegen
pnpm db:migrate:dev
pnpm dev

pnpm types
pnpm test
pnpm lint
pnpm build
```

## Manual Verification URL

```text
http://localhost:3000/manual-signing-smoke
```

Use this to exercise envelope creation, PDF upload, recipient/field creation, send, signing, final status, and final PDF download from the browser.

## Notes For Agents

- Keep source files under 500 lines.
- Test at public API/component/domain boundaries.
- Route files are excluded from test discovery.
- Do not manually edit `src/routeTree.gen.ts`; TanStack Router regenerates it.
- Do not edit `src/components/ui/*` manually.
- Use `AGENTS.md` as the compact context map; load `ARCHITECTURE.md` and `docs/AGENT_GUIDE.md` only when relevant.
- `/plans/simple-esignature-prd.md` defines the core lifecycle contract; feature PRDs such as `/plans/my-documents-prd.md` amend their surfaces.
